message:
feat(web): Add moderation component wrapper and API route alias

ReportButton Component (src/components/moderation/report-button.tsx):
- Simple wrapper around ReportDialog for moderation-specific imports
- Re-exports ReportDialogProps type for consistent typing
- Allows moderation-focused code to import from @/components/moderation

Moderation Report API (src/app/api/moderation/report/route.ts):
- Creates /api/moderation/report endpoint as alias to /api/reports
- Re-exports POST handler for consistent API organization
- Groups moderation-related endpoints under /api/moderation/* namespace

These additions provide cleaner import paths and API structure for
the content moderation subsystem while reusing existing implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
